name: Cox's Bazar
desc: The world's longest natural sandy sea beach.

name: Sundarbans
desc: The largest mangrove forest & home to the Royal Bengal Tiger.

name: Srimangal
desc: Tea capital of Bangladesh with lush green landscapes.

name: Saint Martin's Island
desc: A beautiful coral island in the Bay of Bengal.

name: Jaflong
desc: Picturesque hills and crystal-clear river views.

name: Tanguar Haor
desc: Vast wetland ecosystem, perfect for bird watching.

name: Bandarban
desc: Hilly district full of waterfalls, tribal villages, and scenic beauty.

name: Hakaluki Haor
desc: One of the largest marsh wetlands in Asia.

name: Kuakata Sea Beach
desc: Witness both sunrise and sunset over the sea.

name: Rangamati
desc: Peaceful lake district with tribal culture & natural beauty.

name: Sada Pathor
desc: Stunning stone river area surrounded by hills.

name: Bagerhat Museum
desc: Repository of ancient artifacts from medieval Bangladesh.

name: Fakir Lalon Shah Mazar
desc: Shrine of the famous Baul saint, Lalon Shah.

name: Hardinge Bridge
desc: Iconic British-era railway bridge over the Padma River.

name: Jamtola Beach
desc: Untouched natural beach inside the Sundarbans.

name: Kaptai Lake
desc: Serene artificial lake surrounded by lush hills.

name: Khan Jahan Ali's Tomb
desc: Significant historical and religious site near Bagerhat.

name: M.M. Dutta Memorial
desc: Ancestral home of poet Michael Madhusudan Dutta.

name: Sixty Dome Mosque
desc: UNESCO World Heritage — medieval Islamic architecture.

name: Shilaidaha Kuthi Bari
desc: Historic house where Rabindranath Tagore wrote masterpieces.
